calendar.matters: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-08-2026 Continued To Jun-24-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Seal Materials Exhibits To Proposed Amended Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-22-2026 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERNCE):
Atty. KATIE KUSHNIR, Esq. of Braunhagey & Borden LLP (Tel: 415-599-0210) for plaintiff X Corp.;
No other appearances are made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF X CORP.'s Motion To Seal Materials Exhibits To Proposed Amended Cross-Complaint.

Matter discussed. The court confirms with plaintiff's counsel that plaintiff intends to renew its motion to seal within the next month. The court indicates the subject documents may remain conditionally under seal in the interim.

The court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff X Corp.'s motion to seal exhibits to the stipulation for the filing of an amended cross-complaint is denied without prejudice to re-filing the motion based on evidentiary facts, not conclusions, supporting each of the required findings of CRC 2.550(d). That the exhibits sought to be sealed were produced per the confidentiality terms of a protective order and the defendant does not object to the sealing request are insufficient to support a sealing order. (CRC 2.551(a)). A sealing order may only be granted based on a declaration "containing facts" supporting a finding of each of the five requirements of CRC 2.550(d). (CRC 2.551(b)). The declaration of Zaur Gajiev falls far short of meeting this standard. The material portions of the declaration are largely conclusory and do not identify by page, paragraph, specific information or any other way the information claimed to require a sealing order.

Order signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: S. Kane, Not Reported (301/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2025 Set For Trial On Aug-31-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
